records.ety: [F. caraque (cf. Sp. & Pg. carraca, It. caracca.), LL. carraca, fr. L. carrus wagon; or perh. fr. Ar. qorqūr (pl. qarāqir) a carack.]

defs: A kind of large ship formerly used by the Spaniards and Portuguese in the East India trade; a galleon.
quotes: The bigger whale like some huge carrack lay.
